Privacy Policy

How we collect, use, and protect your information

Data Collection and Usage

PERSONAL INFORMATION:

We Collect:

  • •Legal Name And Contact Information
  • •Government-Issued Identification
  • •Blockchain Wallet Addresses
  • •Authentication Credentials
  • •Communication Preferences

TECHNICAL DATA

We Record:

  • •Device Information
  • •IP Addresses
  • •Browser Type And Version
  • •Network Information
  • •System Logs

USAGE DATA

We Monitor:

  • •Platform Interaction Patterns
  • •Security Event Logs
  • •Transaction History
  • •Access Locations And Times
  • •Feature Utilization Metrics

Data Protection

SECURITY MEASURES

  • •End-to-End Encryption For All Sensitive Data
  • •Regular Security Audits of Blockchain Storage
  • •Multi-Factor Authentication Requirements
  • •Regular Security Audits and Penetration Testing
  • •Backup and Disaster Recovery Systems

STORAGE AND RETENTION

  • •Encrypted Storage On Distributed Systems
  • •Regular Data Backups and Redundancy
  • •Secure Data Centers with Physical Security
  • •Backup Maintenance Procedures

User Rights and Controls

ACCESS RIGHTS

  • •View and Download Your Data
  • •Request Data Copies
  • •Correct Inaccurate Information
  • •Export Transaction History
  • •Review Security Logs

PRIVACY CONTROLS

  • •Limit Data Collection
  • •Visibility Settings
  • •Communication Preferences
  • •Authorization Methods
  • •Activity Notifications

Third-Party Sharing

SERVICE PROVIDERS

Limited Sharing With:

  • •Identity Verification Partners
  • •Blockchain Infrastructure Providers
  • •Legal Compliance Partners
  • •Technical Infrastructure Providers

LEGAL REQUIREMENTS

Data Shared If Required:

  • •Law Enforcement Requests
  • •Court Orders
  • •Regulatory Compliance
  • •Fraud Prevention
